title: Over 60% of Japanese firms with more than 1,000 workers use generative AI
description: More than 60 percent of Japanese firms with over 1,000 employees use generative artificial intelligence, a survey has found, with overall adoption at 34.5 percent and many companies reporting efficiency gains while citing accuracy concerns. content:

title: As cos fast-track AI adoption, data & infra readiness come under spotlight
description: Indian companies are rapidly adopting artificial intelligence. While some have fully integrated AI, many are still in pilot phases. Challenges like data management and infrastructure modernization hinder widespread adoption. Organizations are prioritising data quality and governance for successful AI deployment. Scaling AI reliably remains a key focus for businesses.
content:

title: Indian-origin tech leader Sriram Krishnan exits white house AI team: Here's what he plans next
description: Indian-born AI adviser Sriram Krishnan will leave the White House at the end of June after helping shape key U.S. artificial intelligence policies and initiatives
content: Indian-born tech executive Sriram Krishnan, who currently serves as Senior Policy Adviser for Artificial Intelligence at the White House, has announced that he will step down from his role at the end of June. The Chennai-born techie has built an impr... [2333 chars]

title: Artificial intelligence sets the ball rolling in the bearings industry
description: Bearings are evolving into smart, sensor-driven components using AI and IoT to enable predictive maintenance and improve industrial efficiency
content: Sensors are transforming bearings from purely mechanical parts into intelligent, connected components. Sensorised bearings capture internal measurements — load, temperature, vibration, speed and kinematic behaviour — providing operators with earlier,... [3486 chars]

title: Adityanath sets target of over 2 GW additional data centre capacity in UP by 2030
description: Lucknow, Jun 7 (PTI) Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath on Sunday set a target of developing more than 2 gigawatts (GW) of additional data centre capacity in the state by 2030, asserting that data, artificial intelligence, and digital infrastructure are the key foundations of future economy. During a review of the Uttar Pradesh Data […]
content: He emphasized that the proposed policy should prioritize AI-enabled data centres, energy-efficient and environmentally sustainable green data centres, world-class digital infrastructure, fast-track approval mechanisms, uninterrupted power supply, and... [2634 chars]

title: ‘AI will become job creator for India, not a threat’: Piyush Goyal says India should leverage AI for growth
description: Union Minister Piyush Goyal said Artificial Intelligence will create jobs and business opportunities in India rather than replace workers.

title: Govt fails to buy into AI
description: No serious observer disputes that Thailand must embrace artificial intelligence. AI is transforming economies, industries and labour markets around the world. The question is not whether the country should invest in AI, but whether the TH-AI Passport scheme represents the right investment.

title: Trump Signs AI Order as Race With China Tightens
description: The Trump administration and bipartisan lawmakers are advancing competing efforts to regulate next-generation artificial intelligence systems as U.S. officials race to maintain an edge over China in the rapidly evolving AI sector.

title: Pentagon’s “AI propaganda mill” targets Latin America with fake news sites
description: A Spanish-English site called “La Tilde” looks like a normal news outlet, but it was secretly set up by the U.S. Special Operations Command South (SOCSOUTH) to spread pro-American propaganda in Latin American countries.
